habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Stampede (Ex) A stampede occurs if three or more creatures with stampede make a trample attack while remaining adjacent to each other. While stampeding, the creatures can trample foes of their size or smaller, and the trample's save DC increases by +2.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Stampede (Ex) A stampede occurs if three or more creatures with stampede make a trample attack while remaining adjacent to each other. While stampeding, the creatures can trample foes of their size or smaller, and the trample's save DC increases by +2.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Aurochs
N Large animal
Init +0
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +9
AC 13, touch 9, flat-footed 13 (+4 natural, -1 size)
hp 22 ((3d8+9))
Fort +6, Ref +3, Will +1
Speed 40 ft.
Melee Gore +7 (1d8+9 piercing)
Special Attacks stampede, trample (2d6+9, DC 17)
Special Abilities Stampede (Ex) A stampede occurs if three or more creatures with stampede make a trample attack while remaining adjacent to each other. While stampeding, the creatures can trample foes of their size or smaller, and the trample's save DC increases by +2.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 23, Dex 10, Con 17, Int 2, Wis 11, Cha 4
Base Atk +2; CMB +9; CMD 19
Feats Endurance, Skill Focus (Perception)
Skills Perception +9
Environment  temperate plains
Organization solitary, pair, or herd (3-30)
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary
